meaning: adj.非常的,极度的,胜过的,过度的
examples: He accepts that he was exceeding the speed limit.
I was fined $158 for exceeding the speed limit by 15 mph.
There are fines for exceeding permitted levels of noise pollution.
The federal government has opened real estate to foreigners for projects exceeding 25 acres.
Today, 85% are meeting or exceeding maths standards and 70% are meeting or exceeding English standards.
